ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tenders" (
  "tender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tender */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date when the tender was posted */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company issuing the tender */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector related to the tender (e.g., Solar, Power) */,
  "tender_name" TEXT /* Specific name/title of the tender */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date when bids for the tender will open */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date when bids for the tender will close */,
  "tender_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tender */,
  "tender_status" TEXT /* Current status of the tender (e.g., Open, Closed, Awarded) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Estimated budget for the tender */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the project will take place */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the tender */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the tender */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tender was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the tender */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tender was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "tender_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the tender to which the document is related */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the document */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* User who uploaded the document */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bids" (
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bid */,
  "tender_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the tender to which the bid is related */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company submitting the bid */,
  "bid_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the bid */,
  "bid_date" TEXT /* Date when the bid was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bid (e.g., Submitted, Rejected, Awarded) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the bid */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the bid was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the bid */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the bid was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "tender_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the tender to which the comment is related */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)
